quote: Hope is not just a passive emotion but an active force, a tangible product of intentional, collective actions.
author: Rev. Randy Lewis
socialPost:
Hope is the spark that ignites our collective journey. Let us harness this force, turning dreams into actions, and create a brighter tomorrow together.
